_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin Deficiency Induces Endothelial Cell Proliferation and Retinal Neovascularization.

_contextSnippet: EC outgrowth was significantly higher in Nf1+/− aortic rings stimulated with VEGF when compared with WT aortic rings stimulated with VEGF
details: Enhanced EC outgrowth from aortic rings in response to VEGF compared to WT mice
